_comment: Named ComfyUI render targets for `pixelmon --server NAME`. Copy this file to servers.json and add your machines. Keys starting with _ are ignored. You can also pass a raw host/URL: `--server 192.168.1.50`. RENDER FARM: pass a comma-list to fan jobs across all of them, e.g. `--server gpubox,titan,local` (dynamic dispatch — faster GPUs do more).
